svg.title: SIMPLE nonuniform filtering and refinement schematic
svg.desc: Geometry-first schematic of SIMPLE nonuniform filtering in abinitio3D, refine3D_auto, and postprocess_nu, showing local labels, Potts regularization, and constrained high-resolution refinement.
svg.text: SIMPLE nonuniform filtering is a spatial label-field problem
Each voxel in a masked 3-D volume selects a local transfer function; tent smoothing and a Potts prior turn independent wins into a coherent local-resolution field.

g.text: label colors are local resolution bins
regularizes the label field, not the density directly
larger jumps are penalized as discontinuities.
static NU bank with auxiliary ML/MAP competition
auxiliary volume can win voxel labels during ab initio reconstruction
derived references for the next E-step
constrained high-resolution shell refinement during alignment
only one new Fourier shell is evaluated at a time
outputs guide the next refinement iteration
_nu_filt references feed alignment; finest accepted bin sets matching LP
ML auxiliary candidates are omitted in this refinement path
automated only for refine3D_auto final maps; manual otherwise
label map is estimated from half maps
base bins use NU B/Hann transfer; aux voxels use classical B then FSC filter
4-pixel Hann window at the finest active NU bin

svg.text: Policy boundary: low-resolution even/odd insertion is only a registration trick and is not part of the NU half-map competition, FSC evaluation, or final filtering products.
